CustomField.description: Per-line-item support tier. Lets a deal mix tiers across products (e.g. 24x7 on core platform, Standard on add-ons). Defaults to Opportunity.Support_Tier__c on insert; can be overridden per OLI.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Support tier for this line item (can differ from the Opp default).
CustomField.label: Support Tier
